title: Chewy Vietnamese Lasagne
description: A unique fusion of Chinese and Vietnamese flavors in a classic Italian dish. Chewy noodles and midnight spices add an exotic twist.

ingredients.name: Midnight spices
ingredients.notes: ground cinnamon, star anise, and cardamom

instructions: Cook the lasagne according to the package instructions.
Press and drain the tofu, then cut it into small cubes.
Heat the vegetable oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the tofu and cook until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the midnight spices and cook for another minute.
In a separate pan, combine the chewy noodles, soy sauce, ginger, and green onions.
Stir-fry the noodles for about 2-3 minutes, until they're well coated with the sauce.
Add the cooked tofu to the noodle mixture and stir-fry for another minute.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of the noodle mixture.
Add a layer of the cooked lasagne sheets on top.
Repeat the layers one more time, ending with a layer of the noodle mixture.
Sprinkle sesame seeds on top (if using) and bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
